iterations.theme: Challenges, Career Paths, and Marketing Strategies for Young Professionals and Entrepreneurs
iterations.reason_for_cut: This iteration covers the entire podcast, as its total duration falls within the specified range for a single block, and there are no major thematic shifts that would warrant splitting it.

chapters.topic: Importance of Marketing, Mentorship, and Learning from Failure
Introduction of Sanja Varlaj and Podcast Topic
Biggest Challenges for Young People Today (Information Overload, Focus, Mental Health)
Challenges in Finding a Job and Career Ambition
Essential Skills for Young Professionals (Communication, Teamwork, Hierarchy vs. Assertiveness)
Work-Life Balance and Setting Boundaries in the Workplace
Entrepreneurship: Idea, Self-Belief, Intuition, and Overcoming Fear of Failure
Product Development: Perfection vs. Standards, Market Analysis, and Research
Marketing as the Core of Business Strategy
Differences Between B2B and B2C Marketing Approaches
Strategic Choices for Young Entrepreneurs (B2B vs B2C)
The Value of Mentorship and Proactive Job Seeking
Ambition, Human Values, and Corporate Culture
Social Problem: Mental Health and Self-Confidence in Youth (Logotherapy)
Finding Meaning and Passion in Work for Lasting Happiness
